'''movadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jabbery|jabbery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jabbery|jabbery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| movadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || movadithi || movadiji || movadishi || movadiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || movaduthu || movaduju || movadushu || movaduku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || movaduthu || movaduju || movadushu || movaduku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || movadufthuf || movadufjuf || movadufshuf || movadufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || movadethe || movadeje || movadeshe || movadeke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || movadotho || movadojo || movadosho || movadoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || movadotho || movadojo || movadosho || movadoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || movadofthof || movadofjof || movadofshof || movadofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || movadïfthïf || movadïfjïf || movadïfshïf || movadïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || movadïfthïf || movadïfjïf || movadïfshïf || movadïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || movadïfthïf || movadïfjïf || movadïfshïf || movadïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || movadïfthïf || movadïfjïf || movadïfshïf || movadïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || movadæthæ || movadæjæ || movadæshæ || movadækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || movadatha || movadaja || movadasha || movadaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || movadatha || movadaja || movadasha || movadaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || movadafthaf || movadafjaf || movadafshaf || movadafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || movadasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || movadshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || movadroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || movadmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || movadyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomovadnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gomovadnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomovadnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gomovadnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || movavadasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || movavadshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || movavadroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || movavadmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || movavadyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomovavadnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gomovavadnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomovavadnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gomovavadnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || mevædasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || mevædshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || mevædroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || mevædmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || mevædyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomevædnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gomevædnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomevædnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gomevædnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || movfadasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || movfadshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || movfadroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || movfadmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || movfadyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gomovfadnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gomovfadnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gomovfadnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gomovfadnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
